description: Search simulated network device logs in logs.otel.adaptive-networks*. CRITICAL: use body.text for log message text, NOT body.
Query network fault logs by error mnemonic. Parameter must include wildcards e.g. *BGP-3-NOTIFICATION*. Use body.text NOT body.

configuration.query: FROM logs.otel.adaptive-networks* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 1 hour AND body.text LIKE ?error_type AND severity_text == "ERROR" | SORT @timestamp DESC | LIMIT 50

error_type.description: Wildcard pattern for error mnemonic in body.text, e.g. *BGP-3-NOTIFICATION*

description: Correlate network faults with otel-demo K8s events and VPC flow logs in the last 15 minutes.

configuration.query: FROM logs-k8seventsreceiver.otel-default, logs-aws.vpcflow.otel-default, logs-gcp.vpcflow.otel-default | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 15 minutes | STATS events = COUNT(*) BY data_stream.dataset | SORT events DESC | LIMIT 20
